markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.163 — Application for Motor Number Record; Penalty

A person who fails to comply with Section 501.0332 (Application for Motor Number Record) commits an offense. An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $10 and not more than $100.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 69, eff. January 1, 2012.*
